document_summary: iQIYI Sinan Project Service Training Agreement between Beijing iQIYI Science & Technology Co., Ltd. and Dehuan Liu for training service of 'User Insights and Data Decisions' with a fee of RMB 150,000. Also includes iQIYI company profile from Wikipedia showing it is one of the largest online video platforms with 500M+ monthly active users and US IPO raising $2.25 billion.

snippets.text: # iQIYI Sinan Project Service Training Agreement
snippets.subject: iQIYI Training Agreement
snippets.reasoning: Title of training service agreement between iQIYI and Dehuan Liu, establishing the professional engagement.

snippets.text: 1. Party A appoints Party B Dehuan Liu to provide Party A with the training service of User Insights and Data Decisions
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Confirms Liu was appointed by iQIYI to provide expert training on User Insights and Data Decisions.

snippets.text: Party A and Party B agree on the training fee of RMB150,000 (in words: RMB one hundred and fifty thousand). The said fee shall be the total amount hereunder that Party A shall pay to Party B.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Exact training fee of RMB 150,000 for a single training engagement, demonstrating high compensation for Liu's expertise.

snippets.text: iQIYI is currently one of the largest online video sites in the world, with nearly 6 billion hours spent on its service each month and over 500 million monthly active users. [3][4][5][6] On March 29, 2018, the company issued its IPO (initial public offering) in the U.S. and raised \(\) 2.25\(billion. [7]
snippets.subject: iQIYI
snippets.reasoning: iQIYI profile showing 500M+ monthly users and $2.25B US IPO, establishing the company's stature as a major tech company that engaged Liu.
